- [ ] Security
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Code Quality
- [ ] Testing

### Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Define what "ready for merge" looks like -->

### Additional Context

---

## For Code Reviewer

### Pre-Review Checklist
- [ ] Understand the business context
- [ ] Review PR description and linked issues
- [ ] Examine the diff visually
- [ ] Run tests locally (if applicable)
- [ ] Check CI/CD results

### Review Checklist
- [ ] Security implications reviewed
- [ ] Logic correctness verified
- [ ] Performance implications assessed
- [ ] Code quality standards met
- [ ] Test coverage adequate
- [ ] Error handling comprehensive
- [ ] Documentation updated

### Review Comments
<!-- Use the following format for comments:
### 🔴 CRITICAL: [Issue Title]
- Location: [File:Line]
- Problem: [Explanation]
- Suggestion: [Fix]

### 🟠 HIGH: [Issue]
### 🟡 MEDIUM: [Issue]
### 🔵 LOW: [Issue]
### ✅ Good: [Positive feedback]
-->

### Overall Assessment
<!-- Approve / Request Changes / Comment -->
